title: Respiratory therapy face mask
abstract: Respiratory Therapy Face Mask is employed with the replacement capability of the types of filters for multiple uses with adjustable sizes. It includes the body of the mask with several particles that have at least one detachable cap having a channel that, with the entry of cold air into the mask channel and mixing it with warm and moist air exhaled, a circulation cycle of fresh, moist, and mild air is prepared for breathing that, in order not to be exposed to direct air, it can be connected on the body of the mask, if necessary. There are at least one multi-filter coating to filter polluted air or treat allergic or respiratory diseases such as asthma or aromatherapy, at least two valves for transfer of fresh air into the mask, and at least two connection positions of the mask body to the mask straps to fix the mask on the person's face.
claims:
Claims Claims [Claim 1] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask with Particle Coated is employed with the replacement capability of the types of filters for various applications such as air purification, reduction of air pollution for breathing, treatment of allergic and respiratory diseases, and aromatherapy with an adjustable size that is indirectly exposed to outside air, the mask is comprising: one body of a mask which has multiple particles; at least two mask straps attached to the body of the mask through the connection position ; and at least one detachable cap that, in order not to be exposed to direct air, can be attached on the body of the mask, if needed. [Claim 2] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 1 , wherein the body of the mask is stated, the body of the mask is comprising: a large number of particles are placed together to protect the user of the mask; at least one multi-filter coating to filter polluted air or treat allergic or respiratory diseases such as asthma or aromatherapy; at least two air transfer valves to transmit the fresh air into the mask ;and at least two connection positions of the mask body to the mask straps to fix the mask on the person's face. [Claim 3] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 1 , wherein the two mask straps are stated, two mask straps is comprising : two straps; and two caps so that the junction of the mask strap is tightened and covered through their connection position. [Claim 4] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 1 , wherein the detachable cap is stated, the detachable cap, in order not to be exposed to direct air, can be attached on the body of the mask, if necessary. [Claim 5] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 1 , wherein the body of the mask is stated, the body of the mask has an ergonomic structure 

 that is used on the face of the person without side effects in terms of sensitivity or durable lines on the face. [Claim 6] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 1 , wherein the body of the mask is stated, has a stoma on the inside of the body of the mask, which is a thin layer of soft plastic so that the air does not come directly into the mask and is open from the sides, which leads to the movement of air between the interior of the mask and the multi-filter coating. [Claim 7] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 1 , mask body, two straps, detachable cap is made of a set of materials including thermoplastic resin, polyurethane resin, poly (vinyl chloride), polypropylene, polystyrene, and polyethylene. [Claim 8] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 2, wherein some particles are stated, the particles have a vibrational mode to prevent the impact when a person falls and the person's face collides with the hard objects that are using the mask and, by moving backward and forward, it prevents the intensity of impact incurred to the person's face. [Claim 9] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 2, wherein some particles are stated, the particles are made of soft plastic, silicone, etc. [Claim 10] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 2, wherein some particles are stated, the particles have male and female heads for greater strength when they are intertwined. [Claim 11] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 2, wherein some particles are stated, the particles have replacement capability in the event of failure or damage, in which case there is no need to replace the mask, and only the particles are replaced. [Claim 12] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 2, wherein the multi-filter coating is stated, the multi-filter coating is comprising: two layers of Nano-filter to clean the air and reduce the pollution of air used ;and a thick layer of medical material where different types of materials can be poured according to the individual's allergic disease or improvement of the 

 individual's treatment cycle, which is surrounded by two layers of Nano filter on both sides. [Claim 13] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 11 , wherein the Nano-filter layer is stated, the Nano-filter can be washed with a combination of organic materials and silver nanoparticles and can be replaced. [Claim 14] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 11 , wherein the multi-filter coating is stated, the multi-filter coating is placed inside the channel of the body of the mask by the slots on both sides and is tightened. [Claim 15] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 11 , wherein the Nano-filter is said, the Nano-filter is an antibacterial filter. [Claim 16] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 11 , wherein a thick medical layer is stated, the thick medical layer can contain various substances for the treatment of allergic diseases or impregnated with aromatic substances for the treatment of aromatherapy or the treatment of neurological and mental diseases. [Claim 17] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 2, wherein the air transfer valve is stated, the air transfer valve is used to transfer fresh air and to provide air movement in different directions. [Claim 18] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 2, wherein the air transfer valve is stated, the air transfer valve is firmly fastened by its outer layer inside the hole on the mask (at the junction of the air transfer valve). [Claim 19] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 4, wherein the detachable cap is stated, the detachable cap is connected to the body of the mask by at least one connection clamp on both sides. [Claim 20] Respiratory Therapy Face Mask In according to claim 4, wherein the detachable cap is stated, the detachable cap has a channel that, with the entry of cold air into the mask channel and mixing it with warm and moist air exhaled, a circulation cycle of fresh, moist, and mild air is prepared for breathing. 

[Claim 21] A method for the treatment of allergic diseases by using a mask according to the physician's order; the mentioned approach is comprising steps of: 1 -Determining the disease to allergy by the physician 2- Burning sheep poo (excrement) 3- Pouring the burning excrement that has smoke into the thick medical layer in the multi-filter coating 4- The assembly of nano-filters and thick medical layer inside the multi-filter coating 5- Tightening the multi-filter coating by inserting them into the slots on the body of the mask 6- Opening the air transfer valves in the body of the mask 7- Using the mask by the person for a period of days in terms of the physician's opinion and treatment routine 8- Using the mask with high requirements again after a period of treatment in terms of the physician's opinion 9- Treating allergic diseases
